name: Use Bed
desc: Makes the player lie down in a bed at the specified position.

implementation.overview: Makes a player entity lie down in a bed. Broadcast to all nearby players when someone uses a bed. No known module targets this packet in the examined client codebases (500+ folders).

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S0APacketUseBed)
modules.purpose: Server sends S0APacketUseBed to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
